Fingerprint Learning been involved prison education initiatives Maghaberry Prison, Hydebank Wood College (formerly prison) with Youth Justice Agency delivering education programmes four years.
have delivered '3A' programme these prisons which stands Aspiration, Achievement Access through Whole Brain approaches learning teaching.
very gratifying involved helping collaborate with Magilligan Prison lead unannounced Inspection June 2017.
inspection report Magilligan prison most positive ever about jail Northern Ireland.
report, published Tuesday, describes progress prison near Limavady since last inspected three years "immensely encouraging".
"When inspectors visited Magilligan Prison 2014, were concerned that nearly half prison population participating education, vocational training work activities," said chief inspector Brendan McGuigan.
"However, when visited prison June this year, found excellent progress been made this area.
Time cell much improved learning, skills work provision moved forward significantly with about three quarters held there engaged range purposeful activity."
Fingerprint Learning specifically mentioned report contributing this result which best ever prison Northern Ireland.
element this contribution made Fingerprint Learning BrainFit programme older prisoners.
This designed promote cognitive stimulation deterrent dementia mental decline.
March blog will have more this.
However, lesson learnt from experience prisons been that what known 'purposeful activity' actually falls short needs prison population rates re-offending prisoners leave prison with more purposeful lives after imprisonment.
great need activity prison, especially education training, geared match potential employment opportunities prisoners release.
Accumulating educational qualifications engaging 'purposeful activity' camouflage absence realistic preparation employment.
there critical area that needs addressed improve prisoners experience release reduce re-offending give prisoners hope aspiration employment soon they enter prison system then match their education training genuine opportunities employment, however long their sentences
this seriously addressed priority prisons part Prisons 2020 consultation planning prisons would transform current policies outcomes imprisonment massively.
Prisons could become transformative communities with prisoners being given hope being prepared specific careers life outside.
Without vision life transformation such this will continue find that however engaged prisoners 'purposeful activities' education training, outcomes will unlikely change significantly.
Through contribution this Report been inspiring meet work with leadership seeing this clearly working hard bring such transformations about.
This just good prisoners whole society.

short post while everyone enjoying their Labor weekend that want briefly revisit.
topic growth jobs current recovery.
many people have noted, disproportionate share jobs being created this upturn low-paying sectors like restaurants retail trade.
This means that even people able find work current labor market conditions unlikely that will provide enough income support family.
hand have technology story which tells economy changed.
jobs that used provide decent standard living middle class disappearing.
brave world robots computers economy creates some number very good jobs people with right skills creates jobs everyone else.
other line reasoning that technology that changed, rather people's desperation that forcing them take jobs that they would have considered otherwise.
this view jobs were always there, most people better alternatives they didn't take them.
What's changed from period when didn't many jobs that have much weaker labor market.
weakness labor market factor this story.
Note that these stories have very different policy implications.
first story, want train more losers skills they need become winners.
ones just can't hack computer technology, well maybe some spare change keep them housed, know, life tough.
weak labor market story boost demand.
This done through government spending, reducing trade deficit, redistributing work through work sharing.
labor market tightens then people will able better jobs.
fact, labor market tightens enough even jobs will become better jobs.
tight labor market, employers will people much more work fast food restaurants retail clerks.
decided very simple test distinguish between these stories.
looked change share hotel restaurant employment state, compared with state's current unemployment rate.
latter being good measure strength labor market.
technology story right, then there should relationship between growth restaurant share employment unemployment rate.
anything, might expect negative relationship with states that moving more rapidly into brave economy with high restaurant employment also seeing most growth, therefore lower unemployment.
other hand, weak labor market story predicts that higher unemployment rate would associated with larger increase restaurant share employment.
This simply story that high unemployment rates will make workers more desperate force them take jobs.
turned that test supported weak labor market story.
showed strong positive relationship between growth share restaurants employment unemployment rate.
(The coefficient unemployment rate variable 0.0013 with t-statistic 4.65, which significant percent level.)
This fact hard reconcile with changing technology story.
This very simple test from conclusive, suggests that problem paying jobs simply weak labor market, grand shift technology.
While it's always good idea encourage people develop more skills better education, this solution underlying problem.
have economy moving that will again close full employment.
